mapper.sql: id, workspace_id, collaborator_workspace_id, target_object_type, target_object_id, role_id, allowed_actions, valid_until, status, reason, revoked_at, revoke_reason, revision, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collaboration_grant (id, workspace_id, collaborator_workspace_id, target_object_type, target_object_id, role_id, allowed_actions, valid_until, status, reason, revoked_at, revoke_reason, revision, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{workspaceId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{collaboratorWorkspaceId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{targetObjectType}, #{targetObjectId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{roleId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{allowedActionsJson}, #{validUntil, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{reason}, #{revokedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{revokeReason}, #{revision}, #{createdAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{updatedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler})
mapper.update: UPDATE collaboration_grant SET status = 'REVOKED', revoked_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revoke_reason = #{reason}, updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND revision = #{expectedRevision} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

UPDATE collaboration_grant SET status = 'EXPIRED', updated_at = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' AND valid_until IS NOT NULL AND valid_until < #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}
